mapper.select:
/* bondSaleMapper.selectSoldReceiptByMonth */
SELECT A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT + A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT AS PRV_YET_PYMN_AMNT , CASE WHEN A.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT - A.RMN_INST_CNT > 0 THEN ABS(A.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT - A.RMN_INST_CNT) ELSE 0 END AS INST_CNT , A.BILL_AMNT , A.PYMN_AMNT , A.UNPAY_AMNT , CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS TO_UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT , A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT , A.UNPAY_ARRS_TMSCNT , CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT = 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS FULL_PRFPAY_AMNT , CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT > 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS MID_PRFPAY_AMNT , A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT , A.ADJS_AMNT , CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT ELSE 0 END AS ARRS_FEE_INV_AMNT , A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT , B.YET_PYMN_AMNT - A.YET_PYMN_AMNT AS DSC_AMNT , A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT + A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT AS REAL_PYMN_AMNT , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET A , MSP_BOND_ASSET B , MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL C WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO -- AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AND B.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{billYm}, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') AND C.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.BILL_YM = #{billYm}

/* bondSaleMapper.selectSoldReceiptByMonthSum */ SELECT SUM(A.YET_PYMN_AMNT + A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT) AS PRV_YET_PYMN_AMNT , NULL AS INST_CNT , SUM(A.BILL_AMNT) AS BILL_AMNT , SUM(A.PYMN_AMNT) AS PYMN_AMNT , SUM(A.UNPAY_AMNT) AS UNPAY_AMNT , SUM(CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS TO_UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT , SUM(A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT) AS UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT , NULL AS UNPAY_ARRS_TMSCNT , SUM(CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT = 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS FULL_PRFPAY_AMNT , SUM(CASE WHEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT > 0 AND A.YET_PYMN_AMNT > 0 THEN A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS MID_PRFPAY_AMNT , SUM(A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT) AS GRNT_INSR_AMNT , SUM(A.ADJS_AMNT) AS ADJS_AMNT , SUM(CASE WHEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT > 0 THEN A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT - B.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT + B.ARRS_FEE_AMNT ELSE 0 END) AS ARRS_FEE_INV_AMNT , SUM(A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT) AS ARRS_FEE_AMNT , SUM(B.YET_PYMN_AMNT - A.YET_PYMN_AMNT) AS DSC_AMNT , SUM(A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT + A.GRNT_INSR_AMNT + A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + A.ADJS_AMNT + A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT) AS REAL_PYMN_AMNT , SUM(A.YET_PYMN_AMNT) AS YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET A , MSP_BOND_ASSET B , MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL C WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO -- AND A.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AND B.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(#{billYm}, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') AND C.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.BILL_YM = #{billYm}

/* BondSaleMapper.getBondSaleInfo */ SELECT C.BOND_SEQ_NO , C.SALE_NO , C.TITLE , C.SALE_STAT_CD , C.TRGT_STRT_DT , C.TRGT_END_DT , (TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.TRGT_STRT_DT,'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.TRGT_END_DT,'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS TRGT_PERIOD , FN_GET_USRNM(C.SALE_CFM_ID) AS SALE_CNFM_ID , SUBSTR(C.SALE_CFM_DT,0,8) AS SALE_CNFM_DTTM , COUNT(B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO) AS TOTAL_CNT , SUM(B.YET_PYMN_AMNT) AS TOTAL_RMN_AMT , DECODE((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_STTC WHERE (BILL_YM, BOND_SEQ_NO) IN ( SELECT MAX(BILL_YM), MAX(BOND_SEQ_NO) FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_STTC WHERE BOND_SEQ_NO = A.BOND_SEQ_NO ) AND RUN_USR_ID IS NULL ),1,'Y','N') AS RTN_YN FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL A , MSP_BOND_ASSET B , MSP_BOND_SALE_MST C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = C.BOND_SEQ_NO AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND B.BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM,'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') GROUP BY C.BOND_SEQ_NO , C.SALE_NO , C.TITLE , C.SALE_STAT_CD , C.TRGT_STRT_DT , C.TRGT_END_DT , C.SALE_CFM_ID , C.SALE_CFM_DT , A.BOND_SEQ_NO, C.SALE_STAT_CD

/* BondSaleMapper.selectSoldAssetListBySum */ SELECT SUM(B.TTL_INST_AMNT) AS TOTAL_INST_AMT , SUM((SELECT YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET WHERE GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM,'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') )) AS TOTAL_BOND_SALE_AMT , SUM((SELECT YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET WHERE GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND BILL_YM = B.BILL_YM AND BOND_SEQ_NO IS NOT NULL )) AS TOTAL_RMN_INST_AMT FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL A , MSP_BOND_ASSET B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND B.BILL_YM = #{billYm} AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo}

/* BondSaleMapper.selectSaleStaticDtl */ SELECT '' AS RCV_NM , '' AS SND_NM , '' AS RCV_DEP , '' AS SND_DEP , '' AS RCV_FAX , '' AS SND_FAX , '' AS PAY_DATE , '' AS PAY_ACCOUNT , A.BOND_SEQ_NO , A.BILL_YM , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT , A.BILL_AMNT , A.PYMN_AMNT , A.REAL_PYMN_AMNT , A.MID_PRFPAY_AMNT , A.UNPAY_AMNT , A.ARRS_FEE_AMNT , A.UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT , A.UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT , A.ADJS_AMNT , A.NR_FULL_PRFPAY_AMNT , A.NR_MID_PRFPAY_AMNT , A.NR_PYMN_AMNT , A.NR_CANC_AMNT , A.NR_RTN_AMNT , A.INSR_BILL_AMNT , A.INSR_PYMN_AMNT , A.RUN_AMNT , A.RUN_USR_ID , A.RUN_DT , A.BOND_CNT , A.NR_FULL_PRFPAY_CNT , A.NR_MID_PRFPAY_CNT , A.NR_PYMN_CNT , A.NR_CANC_CNT , A.ADJ_CNT , A.INSR_BILL_CNT , A.INSR_PYMN_CNT , A.NR_RTN_CNT , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_00 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_01 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_02 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_03 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_04 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_05 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_06 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_07 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_08 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_09 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_10 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_11 , A.YET_PYMN_AMNT_12 , A.REG_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.CHNG_ID , A.CHNG_DTTM , DECODE(RUN_USR_ID,NULL,'N','Y') AS MTG_CFM_YN , (INSR_BILL_AMNT - INSR_PYMN_AMNT) AS INSR_MTG_AMNT , RUN_AMNT AS MTG_TOTAL_AMT , (PYMN_AMNT + MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + UNPAY_AMNT + INSR_PYMN_AMNT + RUN_AMNT + ADJS_AMNT + (INSR_BILL_AMNT - INSR_PYMN_AMNT)) AS SUB_SUM_AMT , (PYMN_AMNT + MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + UNPAY_AMNT + INSR_PYMN_AMNT + RUN_AMNT + ADJS_AMNT + (INSR_BILL_AMNT - INSR_PYMN_AMNT) + UNPAY_ARRS_FEE_AMNT) AS TOTAL_SUM_AMT , YET_PYMN_AMNT + REAL_PYMN_AMNT + MID_PRFPAY_AMNT + ADJS_AMNT + NR_CANC_AMNT AS MNTH_FST_AMT , BOND_CNT - NR_FULL_PRFPAY_CNT - NR_PYMN_CNT - INSR_PYMN_CNT - NR_RTN_CNT AS MNTH_LST_CNT , NVL((SELECT UNPAY_ARRS_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_STTC WHERE BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.BILL_YM, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') and BOND_SEQ_NO = A.BOND_SEQ_NO ),0) AS DLY_BILL_AMT FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_STTC A WHERE 1=1 AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.BILL_YM = #{billYm}

/* BondSaleMapper.selectSaleBckInfoListBySum */ SELECT SUM(B.YET_PYMN_AMNT) AS RTN_AMT_SUM FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL A , MSP_BOND_ASSET B , MSP_BOND_SALE_MST C WHERE 1=1 AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.RTN_YM = B.BILL_YM AND A.RTN_YM IS NOT NULL AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = C.BOND_SEQ_NO
AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo}

/* BondSaleMapper.selectScheduledCfList */ WITH BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC AS (SELECT C.YET_PYMN_AMNT AS REMAIN_AMT, C.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT - MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(B.SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), TO_DATE(SUBSTR(C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO, 0, 6), 'YYYYMM')) AS REMAIN_CNT, A.SALE_YM FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_MST A, MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL B, MSP_BOND_ASSET C WHERE A.BOND_SEQ_NO = B.BOND_SEQ_NO AND B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), -1), 'YYYYMM') = C.BILL_YM AND B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = C.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} ) SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-0) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-0) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 1), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-1) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-1) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 2), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-2) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-2) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 3), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-3) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-3) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 4), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-4) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-4) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 5), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-5) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-5) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 6), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-6) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-6) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 7), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-7) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-7) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 8), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-8) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-8) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 9), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-9) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-9) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 10), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-10) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-10) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 11), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-11) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-11) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 12), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-12) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-12) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 13), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-13) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-13) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 14), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-14) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-14) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 15), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-15) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-15) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 16), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-16) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-16) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 17), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-17) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-17) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 18), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-18) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-18) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 19), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-19) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-19) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 20), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-20) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-20) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 21), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-21) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-21) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 22), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-22) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-22) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 23), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-23) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-23) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 24), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-24) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-24) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 25), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-25) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-25) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 26), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-26) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-26) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 27), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-27) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-27) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 28), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-28) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-28) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 29), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-29) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-29) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 30), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-30) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-30) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 31), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-31) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-31) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 32), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-32) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-32) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 33), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-33) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-33) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 34), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-34) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-34) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM UNION ALL SELECT SALE_YM, SUM(MON_AMT) AS EXP_BOND_AMT FROM (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(SALE_YM, 'YYYYMM'), 35), 'YYYYMM') AS SALE_YM, CASE WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-35) = 1 THEN REMAIN_AMT - ( TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) * ( REMAIN_CNT - 1 ) ) WHEN (REMAIN_CNT-35) > 1 THEN TRUNC(REMAIN_AMT/REMAIN_CNT, -1) ELSE 0 END AS MON_AMT FROM BOND_SALE_DATA_STTC ) GROUP BY SALE_YM

/* BondSaleMapper.selectSoldAssetList2 */ SELECT B.CONTRACT_NUM , B.SUB_LINK_NAME , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP001', B.CUSTOMER_TYPE) AS CUSTOMER_TYPE , DECODE(B.CUSTOMER_TYPE, 'I', SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(B.USER_SSN),0,6), '') AS USER_SSN , B.TAX_ID , B.OPEN_AGNT_CD , C.ORGN_NM , B.SUB_ADR_PRIMARY_LN , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO , TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.INST_STRT_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1), 'YYYYMM')||'01' AS PAY_STRT_DT , TO_CHAR(LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(B.INSR_TRMN_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), 1)), 'YYYYMMDD') AS PAY_END_DT , '매월말일' AS REDEEM_DT , F_GET_KT_CODE_NM('MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO', 'BL_BILLING_METHOD', B.BL_BILLING_METHOD) AS BL_BILLING_METHOD , B.TTL_INST_AMNT , 0 AS INST_INT_AMT , 0 AS INST_ETC_AMT , B.TTL_INST_AMNT + 0 + 0 AS INST_TOTAL_AMT , (SELECT YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET WHERE GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM,'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL ) AS BOND_SALE_AMT , 0 AS BOND_SALE_INT_AMT , 0 AS BOND_SALE_ETC_AMT , (SELECT YET_PYMN_AMNT FROM MSP_BOND_ASSET WHERE GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND BILL_YM = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(A.SALE_YM,'YYYYMM'),-1),'YYYYMM') AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL ) + 0 + 0 AS BOND_SALE_TOTAL_AMT , B.YET_PYMN_AMNT , TRUNC(B.TTL_INST_AMNT/B.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT,-1) AS MON_BILL , B.TTL_INST_MNTH_CNT , B.RMN_INST_CNT , B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO , A.BOND_SEQ_NO FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL A , MSP_BOND_ASSET B , ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST C WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL AND B.MST_YN = 'Y' AND B.OPEN_AGNT_CD = C.KT_ORG_ID(+) AND C.TYPE_CD(+) = '20' ORDER BY B.OPEN_DT DESC

/* BondSaleMapper.selectSoldAssetList2BySum */ SELECT SUM(B.TTL_INST_AMNT) AS TOTAL_INST_AMT , SUM(B.YET_PYMN_AMNT) AS TOTAL_REMAIN_AMT FROM MSP_BOND_SALE_DTL A , MSP_BOND_ASSET B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO = B.GRNT_INSR_MNGM_NO AND A.BOND_SEQ_NO = #{bondSeqNo} AND A.RTN_YM IS NULL AND B.MST_YN = 'Y'
